name: nex-n1-agentic-ecosystem
description: Framework for training agentic models via unified large-scale environment construction
paperTitle: Nex-N1: Agentic Models via Large-Scale Ecosystem
content:
## Nex-N1: Agentic Models via Large-Scale Ecosystem

### Core Concept

This skill implements techniques from paper arXiv:2512.04987 for improving agent reasoning, adaptation, and decision-making in complex tasks.

### Implementation

See paper for implementation details: https://arxiv.org/abs/2512.04987

### Practical Guidance

Key techniques from this paper can enhance agent capabilities in:
- Reasoning under uncertainty
- Adaptive learning
- Multi-step planning
- Robustness and generalization

Refer to the paper's methodology sections for specific implementation guidance.
